title: スプリングSの後に・止まらず先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Spring Stakes behind her, Rice Shower
carefully reviews her results and vows to work
even harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Mihono Bourbon's speed
proved worthy of her nickname, the Auburn
Rocket. The crowd's ecstatic cheers echo
throughout the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower can't stop working if she hopes to
catch up to Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on the Japanese Derby and
begins training in earnest.
